shiplounge_description: For all crew on the vessel
speaktowellnesssofficer_description: Schedule a session with trusted experts offering confidential support, a fresh perspective, and real guidance—this is your safe space.
myassessments_description: Confidential and private check-ins designed to help you reflect, build resilience, and make life at sea safer and happier for everyone.
monthlyhappinessindex_description: Contribute to global insights that shape a better future for all seafarers.
personalitymap_description: Discover your working style and strengths at sea
emergencyandsos_description: Immediate response for onboard crises or life-threatening situations
sailorssocietylive_description: Trusted worldwide for 200+ years - 24/7 emotional and spiritual support from trained maritime chaplains and counsellors
oneassistantmanyfaces_description: AI-powered buddies built to guide, support, and answer you—anytime, anywhere

wouldyouliketodeleteyourpost: Would you like to delete your post?
marpol_description: Report violations of marine pollution laws in full confidentiality
sexualharassment_description: Speak up safely and confidentially about abuse, harassment, or toxic behaviour onboard
mlc_description: Raise concerns under the Maritime Labour Convention regarding your rights and welfare in full confidentiality
buddyup_description: Unwind, connect with your crew, and get rewarded for making ship life more fun.
howmileswork_description1: Join or host BuddyUp events to earn miles, climb the leaderboard, and get recognized by your crew and company.
howmileswork_description2: Your participation adds up — unlock badges, earn visibility, and become a recognised name in your fleet.
thissectionapplicableforshipstaff: This section is applicable only for ship staff signed onboard vessel
youarenotonanyship: You're not currently part of any ship.
overallcrewranking_description: All-time rank based on BuddyUp event miles. Recognising crew who stay active, social and engaged.
emailvalidation: Please enter a valid email address.
passwordshould8charlong: Password should be at least 8 characters long.
termssubdescription: Welcome aboard! By creating an account or using SeaBuddy, you agree to the following Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before proceeding.
youragreementwithseabuddy_description: SeaBuddy is a mental health and community platform designed exclusively for seafarers. By using our app, you agree to these Terms, our Privacy Policy, and any updates we may issue from time to time. SeaBuddy is owned and operated by The Social Maritime Pte Ltd, registered in Singapore (UEN: 202403057M).

eligibility_description.seafarerRequirement: Be a seafarer or employee associated with a shipping company.
eligibility_description.accurateInfoRequirement: Provide accurate and truthful information during onboarding and assessments.

yourdataandprivacy_description: We take your peace of mind seriously. All your personal data, including mental health inputs and personality assessments, are kept confidential and secure. Only authorized personnel from SeaBuddy and your employer (if the account is employer-linked) can view anonymized or necessary information. We do not sell your data. For more details, refer to our Privacy Policy.

purposeofassessments_description.description: The psychological assessments (e.g., Nautical Nature's Survey, Happiness Index Survey, Big Five test) are designed to provide supportive insights into your personality and well-being. These assessments:
purposeofassessments_description.noDiagnosis: Do not diagnose or treat mental illnesses.
purposeofassessments_description.enhanceExperience: Are meant to enhance your onboard experience and optimize role suitability.
purposeofassessments_description.employerUse: May be used by your employer as a non-binding reference for crew placement or support.

useofaiandchatbots_description.description: SeaBuddy includes AI features such as Jolli - your friendly AI companion. Jolli can:
useofaiandchatbots_description.reflectMood: Help you reflect on your mood
useofaiandchatbots_description.promptUpdates: Prompt you to log well-being updates
useofaiandchatbots_description.disclaimer: Important: Jolli is not a licensed therapist. For real mental health concerns, please reach out to our human counselors or emergency helplines listed in the app.

contentandinteraction_description.description: SeaBuddy is also your crew's private social network. You agree to:
contentandinteraction_description.respectOthers: Respect fellow crew members while posting or chatting.
contentandinteraction_description.noOffensiveContent: Avoid uploading offensive, harmful, or illegal content.
contentandinteraction_description.professionalCommunication: Keep all communication professional, safe, and inclusive.
contentandinteraction_description.enforcement: SeaBuddy reserves the right to flag or remove inappropriate content and temporarily suspend or restrict access if necessary.

gamifiedactivitiesandrewards_description.description: Points earned via Seafarer's Quest, mood logs, and group events will reflect on your profile leaderboard. These points may be used for recognition or rewards. Reward schemes may vary based on company policy or SeaBuddy incentives.
gamifiedactivitiesandrewards_description.note: Note: Participation is voluntary and meant to encourage well-being – no penalty exists for non-participation.

counselingservices_description.description: If your assessment results suggest follow-up counseling:
counselingservices_description.contact: You may be contacted by a licensed SeaBuddy partner counselor.
counselingservices_description.confidential: Counseling is confidential and intended for personal development, not disciplinary action.
counselingservices_description.noImpact: Your participation in counseling will never impact your employment status.

appmodificationandavailability_descripti.description: SeaBuddy is continuously evolving. We may:
appmodificationandavailability_descripti.maintenance: Temporarily suspend access for maintenance or upgrades
appmodificationandavailability_descripti.notification: We will do our best to notify you ahead of major changes.

accounttermination_description: You may stop using SeaBuddy anytime. We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these Terms or cause harm to the community.

limitationsofliability_description.description: SeaBuddy is a supportive tool, not a medical or emergency service. We are not liable for:
limitationsofliability_description.personalDecisions: Personal decisions made based on app content
limitationsofliability_description.emergencyNote: In emergencies, please use the 24/7 helpline or contact local medical professionals.

feedbackandsuggestions_description: We love hearing from you! Any feedback submitted may be used to improve SeaBuddy. While we appreciate your ideas, we're not obligated to compensate for suggestions.
jurisdiction_description: These Terms are governed by the laws of Singapore. Any disputes arising in connection with these Terms shall fall under the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Singapore. By selecting "Agree", you acknowledge and accept these Terms and commence your journey with SeaBuddy — your trusted companion at sea, committed to fostering well-being and support across every voyage.

contactinformation_description.description: For any issues or questions about these terms, contact:

forgotpasswordDescription: No worries, please enter your registered email address, we’ll send you reset instructions.
passwordvalidationerror: Use 8+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, number & symbol.
info_popup_text: This quick test helps me understand how you think, feel, and connect — so I can guide you better on board. You’ll learn things about yourself most people go their whole lives not knowing. And trust me — when you do know, life (and crew life) just makes a whole lot more sense.
heading: Alright, before we dive in, let's figure out what really drives you!
benefit_1: Discover how your unique traits shape the way you think, feel and work!
benefit_2: Learn how your personality type influences many areas of your life.
benefit_3: Your responses are private and used only to support your well-being.
happinessindexdescription: Based on the industry-standard Seafarers’ Happiness Index

survey.intro: This short survey helps us understand how you’re feeling at sea across work, relationships, rest, and connection. Your feedback shapes better support, systems, and onboard culture. Tailored to your real needs.
survey.anonymous: 🔹 Anonymous & Confidential: Your responses are safe and for improvement, not evaluation
survey.impactful: 🔹 Impactful: Honest answers lead to real changes

happinessindexdisclaimer: * This survey is private and strictly confidential only to support crew wellbeing, not performance review or employment decisions.
happinessindexmessage: Fill the Seafarers’ Happiness Index now and contribute to global insights that shape a better future for all seafarers.
personalitymapdesc: This personality map helps you understand your unique traits, behaviour, and way of thinking
mandatorydesc: Personality map test is now mandatory. This test is not being used to profile the candidate and affect his employability.
mandatoryindays: Personality map test will become mandatory in ${{diffDays}} days. This test is not being used to profile the candidate and affect his employability.

onboarding.cardTitle1: Built for Seafarers, backed by Science.
onboarding.cardDescription1: Designed for maritime environment, our onboarding process evaluates psychological readiness, rank suitability, and well-being indicators.
onboarding.cardDescription2: Track your emotional health and early signs of fatigue or isolation.
onboarding.title3: Access to a Rich Resource Library
onboarding.cardDescription3: Expert-curated content to keep minds steady and spirits strong.
onboarding.title4: Peer Support Community and Professional Help
onboarding.cardTitle4: Company Wide Social Feed. 24/7 Global Support.
onboarding.cardDescription4: Join onboard communities and reach out for wellness support anytime.
onboarding.cardTitle5: Host. Hang Out. Hit the Leaderboard.
onboarding.cardDescription5: Participate, earn rewards, and strengthen your crew bond.
onboarding.cardDescription6: Start your wellness journey with your crew today.

uploadPhotoDescription: Please upload a clear and recent photo of yourself. A good profile picture helps others recognize you and personalize your experience.
